title: Chowkidar Hi Chor Hai
overview: A laid-back village watchman discovers a strange gift; whatever he dreams at 4 a.m. becomes reality. When donation money is stolen, he pretends to dream the truth, until a real dream reveals a shocking secret: he himself is the thief. With a young man blackmailing him and the village closing in, he manipulates everyone and ultimately escapes with the stolen cash.
